data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences $208 Million Liquidation in One Hour
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market witnessed a significant liquidation event, totaling $208 million in the past hour. Of this amount, long positions accounted for $205 million, while short positions saw liquidations of $3.335 million. This development highlights the volatility and rapid changes within the crypto trading environment.

data.title: JPMorgan Chase CEO: The Fed is right to wait and see, and is ready for interest rates to rise to 5%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon said that the Fed is right to wait and see now. We are fully prepared for interest rates to rise to 5%. The Fed can try to manipulate long-term interest rates, but this manipulation will not last long. Artificial intelligence may have a deflationary effect, but it will not appear next year. (Jinshi)

data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinglass data shows that in the past hour, the entire network has a liquidation of 208 million US dollars, of which long orders have a liquidation of 205 million US dollars and short orders have a liquidation of 3.4267 million US dollars.

data.title: JPMorgan CEO Warns of Potential U.S. Bond Market Disruption
data.description: According to BlockBeats, JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon has expressed concerns about the U.S. bond market, suggesting it may experience significant disruption. Dimon noted that while the Federal Reserve might attempt to control long-term interest rates, such measures are unlikely to be sustainable. He also stated that JPMorgan is fully prepared for interest rates to rise to 5%.

data.title: Crypto-Assets and Financial Stability: The Bank of Italy’s Call for Caution
data.description:
The Bank of Italy has cautioned that deeper integration between crypto-assets and traditional finance could transmit price shocks to the wider economy. Governor Fabio Panetta has promoted Europe’s MiCA regime and tougher oversight of stablecoins to safeguard payments, data, and monetary sovereignty.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bank-of-italy-crypto-warning-systemic-shock/

data.title: A whale bought 34,343 ETH at $2,593 an hour ago
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale bought 34,343 ETH at $2,593 an hour ago, worth $89.03 million.
The whale borrowed 15,000 ETH ($29.4 million) from Aave on April 22 and sold it at $1,660. On April 23, he withdrew all 35,754 ETH from AAVE and sold it at $1,794.

data.title: Bitcoin at $106K—But $9.8B in Options Expiring Could Change Everything
data.description:
TL;DR Bitcoin is holding steady near $106,000 despite a recent 1. 7% dip. Today, Bitcoin and Ethereum options worth a combined $11. 5 billion expire, potentially triggering market volatility.
